source_record_details.conditions: Inoculation in/on previously heated (cooked, baked, pasteurized, etc) but not sterilised food/medium, Vacuum-packed
source_record_details.citation: Cooksey (et al.), 1993: Reduction of Listeria monocytogenes in precooked vacuum-packaged beef using postpackaging pasteurisation. Journal of Food Protection    56: 1034 - 1038

construction_notes: elicited_inputs derived from ComBase record_id 4282 (Beef / Precooked beef). N0 = log_cfu at lowest step. Curve spans the full 100-step / 1500h grid with every step either a real observation or linear interpolation between two real readings -- no gp_posterior fill, no padding past the experiment's end. past/future_temperature_segments are an approximate human-readable split of the curve's duration (constant temperature); ground_truth_curve.values is the actual gridded trajectory. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
